text.title: django-project-structure Procedure
text.summary: Five steps to produce a validated layout spec.

step.name: enumerate-apps
step.action: For each domain, pick snake_case plural name. Reject singular / PascalCase candidates.

step.name: per-app-inventory
step.action: Apply rule r2-per-app-inventory: list models.py, services.py, selectors.py, apis.py, serializers.py, urls.py, constants.py, admin.py, tests/test_*.py.

step.name: declare-core-modules
step.input: Project shared concerns: BaseModel, exceptions, pagination, permissions.
step.action: List core_modules. Confirm none reference apps.* submodules.

step.name: declare-config-modules
step.input: Env list (dev / staging / prod) + integrations (Celery, ASGI).
step.action: List config/settings/base.py + dev.py + staging.py + prod.py + config/urls.py + celery.py + wsgi.py + asgi.py.
